home.adminMustCreate: An administrator must create the first category.
home.contractNotDeployedDesc: To use the forum you must first deploy the Move smart contract on the IOTA blockchain.
home.shareDesc: Anyone can connect to this forum with the information below. Data is public on the IOTA blockchain.
home.step1: The user installs the IOTA Free Forum project on their PC
home.step5: The system connects to the smart contract and downloads all events
home.step6: Registers their identity and interacts directly with the blockchain

thread.threadLocked: This thread is locked. New replies cannot be posted.

newThread.title: New Thread
newThread.needIdentity: You need an identity to create a thread.
newThread.encrypt: Encrypt content (only authorized users can read)

threadList.noThreads: No threads. Be the first to start a discussion!

settings.title: Settings
settings.subtitle: Management and debug tools for the forum
settings.themeDesc: Choose the forum theme. Your choice overrides the default theme set by the admin.
settings.exportDataDesc: Download a JSON dump of all data in the server's SQLite database.
settings.exportIdentityDesc: Save the RSA keys and username to a JSON file for backup or migration to another device.
settings.resyncDesc: Clear the local database and re-download all data from the blockchain.
settings.resetCacheDesc: Clear the local SQLite database without resyncing.
settings.deleteIdentityDesc: Remove the RSA keypair and username from the browser.
settings.fullResetDesc: Generate a NEW IOTA wallet, new server RSA keys, clear everything. You will need to re-deploy the smart contract.
settings.fullResetWarning: with a new address. All local data will be deleted. The forum restarts completely from scratch.
settings.oldDataWarning: Old on-chain data remains on the blockchain at the old address, but will no longer be associated with this instance.
settings.deleteIdentityConfirm: Are you sure you want to delete your local identity? If you don't have a backup, you will lose access to your account.
settings.resetInProgressDesc: Generating new wallet, requesting funds from faucet, cleaning database. Do not close this page.

identity.title: Identity
identity.generateDesc: Your identity is an RSA-2048 key pair stored only in your browser. No password, no account — just math.
identity.usernameLinked: This username is linked to your public key on the network.
identity.privacyNote: This preference is saved on the blockchain. Default: hidden.
identity.exportDesc: Download your keypair as a JSON backup
identity.importDesc: Restore from a JSON backup file
identity.generateNewDesc: Discard the current keypair and create a new one
identity.confirmIrreversible: Click again to confirm — this action is irreversible!
identity.currentWillBeLost: Your current identity will be permanently lost

admin.title: Admin Panel
admin.txInProgressDesc: Publishing to IOTA blockchain and verifying. Do not close.
admin.hideConfirm: Do you want to hide the category
admin.hideNote: It will no longer be visible to users.
admin.restoreConfirm: Do you want to restore the category
admin.restoreNote: It will be visible to everyone again.
admin.blockchainNote: This action will be recorded on the blockchain as a signed and verifiable transaction.
admin.searchUser: Search user by ID or username...

dashboard.title: Dashboard
dashboard.lowBalance: Insufficient wallet balance! Top up the wallet to publish transactions.

editor.uploadThenPaste: Upload the image, then paste the direct link above

loadTest.title: Load Test
loadTest.subtitle: Load Test — Forum Stress Test
loadTest.pressStart: Press Start to begin flooding posts, replies, votes...
loadTest.running: The test is sending threads, posts, replies and votes continuously...
loadTest.willPublish: Start the flood test — data will be published on-chain

blockchain.title: Blockchain Info
blockchain.noTx: No transactions found for this entity.
blockchain.categoriesNote: Categories do not support version history yet.
blockchain.description: Every piece of data is cryptographically signed by the author and published on the IOTA 2.0 blockchain. Transactions are immutable and verifiable by anyone.

layout.lowBalanceDesc: The forum wallet has {{balance}} IOTA on the {{network}} network. Top up the wallet to publish transactions.
layout.refuelingDesc: The wallet balance is insufficient. Requesting funds from faucet.
layout.sendAtLeast: Send at least 1 IOTA to this address to restore functionality.
